titleStmt.title: SII 31.213: original edition by C. A. Padmanabha Sastri and T. S. Ravishankar
No. 213. (A.R. No. B 206 of 1936.) DŌMALAGUNDA (NEAR GAṆḌIGANAMALA), VINUKONDA TALUK, GUNTUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: A slab set up near the well to the east of the village.
This is dated in Śaka 1516(7), Manmatha, (Nija Jyēshṭha), ba. 7, Thursday corresponding to 19th June, 1595 A.D.

It records the gift of a land called Kuchhala Chēnu lying in the field of Dōmalaguṇḍa of Vinikoṇḍa-sīma to Nāgābhattu, son of Sattinapalli Kammā battuḍu for digging the well in the fields of Bokkamuntalapāḍu by the donor Nīlapa, the son of Lingamanāyaka and the grandson of Gummaḷḷapu Nīlapanāyaka of Māruṭla gōtra. The boundaries of the gift land are mentioned.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . jayābhyudaya śālivāhana śakavarṣaṁ
bulu 1516(7) Agunēṭi manmatha saṁvatsara jēṣṭha ba 7 gu .
māruṭla gōtrōdbhavulaina gummaḷavu nīlapanāyani pautṛlu
nnu liṁgamanāyani putṛulunnu AIna nīlapaṁgāru sattenapalli ka
mmābattuni kumāruṁḍu nāgābattuniki Iccina mānyaṁ māku sā
givaccī vinikoṁḍaśīmalōni dōmalaguṁḍḍāpu polaṁlōnu ni
ṁgga kuccalacēnu nīvubokkamuṁtalapāṭa polaṁlōnu nuI tavvi
ṁcinaṁduku Istimi ganaka mīputrapautra pāraṁparyaṁgānu A
nubhaviṁcci bratikēdi . Ā cēnistaḷaṁ tūrpuku caṁcula ma
ḍlunuṁḍi vaccina vāṁgumēragānunna dakṣiṇānaku bokka
muṁtalapāṭi pōlimēragānunna paḍimaṭiki nāgārjunu
mulōṁgānu Istimi ganaka yīcēnu
niṁgāni gaṁgakartagōvu
ḍu maṁgalamaha śrī śrī śrī .
Digital edition of SII 31.213 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
